## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Security-relevant (a maintainer will request extra review)

## Checklist

- [ ] Change stays within one module boundary where possible (`PROJECT_STRUCTURE.md`)
- [ ] `make check` passes locally (lint + typecheck + test)
- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] Updated docs and `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased section)
- [ ] Formulas cite the relevant `DATAFLOW.md` section in docstrings
